_note: Issue #677: IMC (portion form) appears in a banner line; canonical banner abbreviation is IMCON. CAPCO-2016 §D.1 p27 line 560 + §G.1 Table 4 p38. Only the form-mismatch diagnostic applies for SECRET//IMC: capco:banner.dissem.floor-imcon has policy AtLeast(SECRET), so the class-floor walker does NOT fire on SECRET (at-the-floor input). For a sub-SECRET IMC input the floor-imcon diagnostic WOULD fire alongside the form-mismatch.
